## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on project status and announce a key account transition.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Contract:** The 2-year term was a legal error; an amendment will be sent to correct it.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Publishing can resume. The editorial strategy now targets document-heavy industries (e.g., manufacturing, insurance) and specific personas (project/sales/client engagement managers).](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [**Performance:** November is on track to match or exceed October's results, with strong engagement for new content pillars (AI agents, construction).](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [**Account Transition:** Vivek Shankar is moving to other accounts. Mara will become the new primary contact for DataGrid.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

## Topics

### Account Transition

  - [Vivek Shankar is moving to other accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Mara will become the new primary contact for DataGrid.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Mara will continue to manage all account activities.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

### Contract Correction

  - [The 2-year contract term was a legal error, not a client request.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [**Action:** Vivek will send an amendment to correct the term.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Publishing:** Can resume, as current website QA is limited to content updates.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [**Editorial Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
      - [**Target Industries:** Document-heavy sectors (manufacturing, insurance, construction, supply chain, commercial real estate).](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Target Personas:** Project, Sales, and Client Engagement Managers.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Based on input from Miles to focus content on specific, high-value audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**Performance (November):**](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [On track to match or exceed October's results.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
      - [New content pillars are driving strong engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [**Top Performers:** AI agents and construction topics.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [**Metric:** LLM referrals are healthy.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)

### Website & Newsletter Updates

  - [**DataGrid AI Site:** Most blog page issues reported by growthx.ai have been fixed by Tiago's team.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [**Programmatic Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Requires a design call with Tiago and web dev support to modify the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
      - [**Action:** Awaiting the client's signal that the team is ready to proceed.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [**Newsletter Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
      - [**Events Calendar:** growthx.ai needs the link to pull in events.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
      - [**Product Updates:** The client lacks a dedicated source; Kaitlin is investigating options beyond the existing Notion roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:** Send contract amendment with the corrected term.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [**Kaitlin:**](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
      - [Find a source for product updates for the newsletter.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
      - [Provide the events calendar link.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
      - [Signal when the team is ready for the programmatic page design call with Tiago.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [**growthx.ai:**](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
      - [Resume publishing content.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
      - [Integrate newsletter sources and feedback once received.](https://fathom.video/share/QcjtfpN63cynqCbvgukuEJHn4z785L8_?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
